grill-me.description: Use this agent to make the agent ask a lot of questions on a specific plan and edit the plan with the updated knowledge
grill-me.prompt:
Interview me relentlessly about every aspect of this plan using the question tool until we reach a shared understanding. Walk down each branch of the design tree, resolving dependencies between decisions one-by-one. For each question, provide your recommended answer.
If a question can be answered by exploring the codebase, explore the codebase instead.
